title: Red Creek Winter - Day 01 police report

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing

Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in.
